author: doll-agent
content: Phase 2 main slice delivered: ~95 functions bound across ufunc and stats. Code organised into ufunc.rs (~340 lines, dispatch macros for unary float / unary float→bool / binary numeric broadcast / binary float / comparison / logical) and stats.rs (~640 lines, reductions / nan-aware / cumulative / sort / unique / set / where). conv.rs gained match_dtype_numeric! and match_dtype_orderable! macros plus the coerce_dtype helper for binary input alignment. cargo clippy -D warnings clean. 233/233 pytest passing (90 phase-1 + 26 phase-0 + 117 new phase-2). Notable: np.in1d was removed in NumPy 2.0 — ferray.in1d is kept as a 1-D-only convenience and the test compares to np.isin instead. Phase 2 long tail filed as #699-#706: bitwise/complex/gcd-lcm/frexp-ldexp-modf-spacing/gradient-trapezoid-sinc-i0-convolve-interp/percentile-quantile-median-cov-corrcoef/histogram family/lexsort-partition-allclose-array_equal/datetime-timedelta. Phase 3 (#688, linalg + fft + random submodules) is unblocked.
